{"id":"project-LICHEN-w9tp","title":"coap_config.c: base64_encode needs space for NUL terminator","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_config.c
Lines: 461-486

The base64_encode function calculates needed size as:
```c
size_t needed = ((src_len + 2) / 3) * 4 + 1;
```

The +1 is for the NUL terminator. However, callers may not account for this:
- Line 527: `base64_encode(identity->pubkey, 32, pk_buf, sizeof(pk_buf))` where pk_buf is 48 bytes
  - For 32 bytes input: ((32+2)/3)*4+1 = 45 bytes needed, 48 available - OK
- Line 498: `base64_encode(pubkey, 12, buf + 7, buf_size - 7)` 
  - For 12 bytes input: ((12+2)/3)*4+1 = 17 bytes needed
  - buf_size is at least 20 (checked at line 492-495), so buf_size-7 >= 13 - NOT ENOUGH

This causes buffer overrun in compute_pubkey_fingerprint when buf_size is exactly 20.

Category: MEMORY - buffer overflow","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:43:41.958364Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:43:41.958396Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-w9tp","title":"coap_config.c: base64_encode needs space for NUL terminator","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_config.c
Lines: 461-486

The base64_encode function calculates needed size as:
```c
size_t needed = ((src_len + 2) / 3) * 4 + 1;
```

The +1 is for the NUL terminator. However, callers may not account for this:
- Line 527: `base64_encode(identity->pubkey, 32, pk_buf, sizeof(pk_buf))` where pk_buf is 48 bytes
  - For 32 bytes input: ((32+2)/3)*4+1 = 45 bytes needed, 48 available - OK
- Line 498: `base64_encode(pubkey, 12, buf + 7, buf_size - 7)` 
  - For 12 bytes input: ((12+2)/3)*4+1 = 17 bytes needed
  - buf_size is at least 20 (checked at line 492-495), so buf_size-7 >= 13 - NOT ENOUGH

This causes buffer overrun in compute_pubkey_fingerprint when buf_size is exactly 20.

Category: MEMORY - buffer overflow","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:43:41.958364Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:15:56.730866049Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:15:56.730866049Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:20:56.730866049Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:15:56.730866049Z"}

new_value: Increased min buf_size to 25 in compute_pubkey_fingerprint to fit "SHA256:" + base64(12 bytes) + NUL. Prevents truncation in base64_encode. Commit cca7558d4.
